definitions.es: Un edificio para la habitación humana.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I will come back to the house at six o'clock this evening.
Do you want to come to my house this weekend?
My parents are renovating the house to celebrate Tet.
exampleSentences: Em sẽ về nhà lúc sáu giờ tối nay.
Anh có muốn đến nhà của chị chơi cuối tuần này không?
Ba mẹ đang sửa lại nhà để đón Tết.
notes:
nhà = house or home. It is one of the most fundamental nouns in Vietnamese.

Use it as a noun to describe a building where people live. When you say "về nhà," it means "go home."

It is also used to refer to family members or as a classifier for some buildings (though infrequently). In everyday speech, it mostly means house or home.

Don't confuse it with the particle "nha" (softener), which has no tone mark.
notes_md:
**nhà** = *house* or *home*. It is one of the most fundamental nouns in Vietnamese.

Use it as a noun to describe a building where people live. When you say **"về nhà,"** it means **"go home."**

It is also used to refer to family members or as a classifier for some buildings (though infrequently). In everyday speech, it mostly means house or home.


Don't confuse it with the particle **"nha"** (softener), which has no tone mark.
